title: NeuroGen Brain and Spine Institute - Comprehensive Clinical Care Centre For Neurological Disorders in India
heading: Dr. Alok Sharma on Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting
description: NeuroGen Brain and Spine Institute is the best Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting centre in India which which treat patients with neurodegerative and neuro developmental disorders.
text: NeuroGen Brain and Spine Institute - Comprehensive Clinical Care Centre For Neurological Disorders in India About us About us Our Team Treatment Protocol Conditions Autism Muscular Dystrophy Cerebral Palsy Intellectual Disability Spinal cord Injury Traumatic Brain Injury Stroke Dementia Motor Neuron Diseases Therapies ABMMCG ABA Therapy Physiotherapy Occupational Therapy Aquatic Therapy Spinal Cord Injury walking track Sensory Integration Speech Therapy Psychological Intervention Special Education Art-based Therapy Diet counselling Group Therapy/ Motivational workshop Facilities Research Achievements Contact Virtual OPD Free teleconsultation , your first step toward personalized care, right from home. Innovative surgical procedure At NeuroGen BSI, autologous bone marrow tissue, after minimal manipulation, is grafted by medical practioners as part of routine procedure within the hospital in the same surgical sitting. According to the directives of the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare issued under section 33P of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act,1940 this procedure does not involve use of stem cells/ stem cell derived product. Safety & Precision Assured NeuroGen BSI holds the beacon of hope, by doing pioneering research in the field of Autologous bone marrow mononuclear cells and comprehensive care for neurological disorders. Learn more about Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting Expertise Devoted to You Witness the unique guidance & hospitality of the best doctors & comprehensive care experts in India, that comes from treating over 15000 patients, globally. Read About the NeuroGen BSI Experience Excellence is our Habit Our Director, Dr. Alok Sharma being felicitated by India's senior-most & highly respected Oncologist, Dr. Suresh Advani, with the 'Times Health Excellence Award' 2018 - 19 for "Excellence in Services in Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting". Our Director, Dr. Alok Sharma being felicitated with the 'Times Health Excellence Award' 2018 - 19 for "Excellence in Services in Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting". VIEW OUR WEBINARS Dr. Alok Sharma on Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting Dr. Alok Sharma Dr. Alok Sharma is a world renowned Neurosurgeon, Neuroscientist and Professor. He has dedicated his life in researching the application of cells in treating incurable neurological conditions. At NeuroGen BSI, he has treated the largest number of patients, in the world, with Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting! Dr Alok Sharma's video about Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting Autologous Bone Marrow Mononuclear Cells Grafting is one of the most promising branches of Medicine, which has proven to have the potential of radically improving the quality of life in patients with incurable neurological conditions.
